summary: Iteration 120 - UI Fixes Verification for Barrister View. All 12 tests passed. Verified: 1) Scale icon visible in CaseDetail header, 2) Reports tab shows 4 report cards with correct colors (emerald/green for Quick Summary, blue for Full Detailed, purple for Extensive Log, dark navy for Barrister Brief), 3) Barrister Brief card expands to show View Barrister Brief + PDF + Word + Print buttons, 4) Barrister View page has dark navy blue header (bg-blue-900), 5) Header has only Back to Case + Print + Export Word + Export PDF buttons (no invisible badge), 6) Red NOT LEGAL ADVICE disclaimer banner visible, 7) Table of Contents with clickable section links, 8) Sections have blue left border and numbered circles.

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning - minor)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI fixes verified for Barrister View. Test case used: case_b24f94577da6 (R v Perry). Barrister View URL: /cases/case_b24f94577da6/reports/rpt_65eacc931446/barrister. Login via API works but UI login button click requires force=True due to modal overlay. Session token can be set directly in localStorage for testing.
